title: Dreaming of Oversized Clothes
description: This dream may indicate feelings of inadequacy or not meeting someone's expectations.

meanings.title: Main Interpretation
meanings.description: According to Sigmund Freud, oversized clothes suggest you might be experiencing an internal conflict or identity crisis. For Carl Jung, they represent a misalignment with your inner self.

meanings.title: Subconscious Warning
meanings.description: Your subconscious is warning you not to fall short of others' expectations.

meanings.title: Life Context
meanings.description: In daily life, this dream may relate to worries about not being good enough in career or relationships.

interpretation: You may be evaluating yourself based on others' expectations, which is causing you discomfort.

context.positive: Could be seen as a process of self-discovery.
context.negative: Can be viewed as insecurity and lack of self-worth.
